article_title: Bylaw 14743 — Housing Agreement (3460 Kalyk Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable senior rental units at 3460 Kalyk Avenue under new housing agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14743 on May 13, 2025, authorizing a legally binding housing agreement with Jubilee Multi Generational Housing Society for a new six-storey seniors residential building at 3460 Kalyk Avenue. The agreement requires a set number of units to be rented at below-market rates to eligible senior households, and locks in market rental tenure — meaning the units cannot be converted to condos or other ownership forms.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review whether similar inclusionary housing obligations apply to your development approvals.
